mapper.insert: INSERT INTO candidate_profile (exam_id, name, gender, age, political_status, is_fresh_graduate, education, origin, target_major, category) VALUES (#{examId}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{politicalStatus}, #{isFreshGraduate}, #{education}, #{origin}, #{targetMajor}, #{category})
mapper.update: UPDATE candidate_profile SET name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, age = #{age}, political_status = #{politicalStatus}, is_fresh_graduate = #{isFreshGraduate}, education = #{education}, origin = #{origin}, target_major = #{targetMajor}, category = #{category} WHERE exam_id = #{examId}
